creator: cmccoy@wayfair.com
text:
We're good with this as we are the submitters. Also that PR number doesn't =
exist in the PR browser.

-----Original Message-----
From: Edwin Groothuis [mailto:edwin@FreeBSD.org]=20
Sent: Tuesday, December 04, 2012 12:50 PM
To: OSSEngineering
Cc: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org
Subject: Re: ports/174118: graphics/pecl-gmagick

Maintainer of graphics/pecl-gmagick,

Please note that PR ports/174118 has just been submitted.

If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix you agre=
e on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch and a committe=
r will take care of it.

The full text of the PR can be found at:
    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/174118

--
Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool edwin@FreeBSD.org

CSN Stores is now Wayfair!  This email was sent to @csnstores.com. Please u=
pdate your contacts to reflect an email address change to @wayfair.com
